decision_reason: Phase 3 readout Grade A but a positive Phase 3 is efficiently priced day-one; cpr 94.24pct = entry at top of range, vol 1.66x is weak confirmation for the biggest biotech catalyst, +25.66pct over 200SMA = extension on extension, $35.51 stop is one ordinary post-readout flush below the $38.50 trigger, R:R 2.17 flattered by lagging analyst-PT target, ~13pct single line on a 1-day-old binary event. Do NOT chase $38.50; confirm clean readout details first, then only a half-size pullback-and-go that holds $38.50 intraday, stand down if it opens above ~$39.5-40. 4 of 5 advisors defer.

B+ C1 Day-2 council: sole blocker = R:R floor fail from a wide Day-1 range; catalyst grade and Day-2 trigger plan were not supplied to the council. Nothing executable today. Promote to A2 only if Day-2 contracts the range (inside/NR bar or pullback holding the Day-1 pivot on declining vol), then breaks the pivot on vol >=1.5x, recomputed R:R >=2.0 vs the tighter stop, AND catalyst grade surfaces as B or better; else degrade to plain B. Thin-float small-cap freight; size on the stop, marketable limit. Do not place a resting buy-stop until a trigger is published.

B+ C1 Day-2 council: sole blocker = R:R floor fail from a wide Day-1 range; catalyst grade and Day-2 trigger plan not supplied. Nothing executable today. Large-cap so liquidity is fine; key open question is catalyst durability - confirm whether the move is a recurring royalty/milestone event (those grind) or a one-off. Promote only on range contraction -> pivot break on vol >=1.5x -> recomputed R:R >=2.0 with a confirmed >=B catalyst; else degrade to B.

B+ C1 Day-2 council, lowest conviction of the three: sole blocker = R:R floor fail from a wide Day-1 range; catalyst grade and Day-2 trigger plan not supplied. Dry-bulk shipping catalysts are usually macro/rate-index moves (sector beta, not idiosyncratic), spreads wider and gappier so the C1 stop-distance problem is more likely to persist. Degrade to plain B unless Day-2 delivers BOTH genuine range contraction AND a confirmed company-specific >=B catalyst. Nothing executable today.
